_publications._publicationTitle: Genetically mediated Nf1 loss in mice promotes diverse radiation-induced tumors modeling second malignant neoplasms.

_contextSnippet: sarcomas are well recognized SMNs after high-dose radiation therapy (21–23), and were significantly more common in irradiated Nf1+/− mice than irradiated WT mice (p = 0.0175, log-rank)
details: Sarcomas were significantly more common in irradiated Nf1+/- mice than irradiated wildtype mice (p = 0.0175, log-rank)
